title: Author product-detail view models for the Utilities aisle
description: Author one view model per widget in the Utilities aisle. These are structural helpers (TViewBuilder, TResponsiveBuilder, TMarkdownFileItem) whose showcases read live data out of the framework.

context.view_builder_specials: TViewBuilder is a host — it hosts a view model + optionally the contextual buttons overlay. The product page demonstrates its lifecycle by exposing counters for onModelReady / onModelDispose fires, a 'recreate' button that flips an identity cell to force a rebuild, and a 'host contextual buttons' toggle.
context.responsive_builder_specials: The product page reads the active TData and TTools values out of TResponsiveBuilder's builder callback. The view model does not own these values — it only exposes cells for any customisation knobs (e.g. a custom breakpoint override if meaningful). The live TData display happens in the view, reading from the TResponsiveBuilder callback params directly.
context.markdown_file_item_specials: The view model exposes a fileName cell (selected from a dropdown of available markdown snippets from MockContentService.markdownContent()) and a 'last open tap' observable. The preview reads the markdown content via MockContentService.

goals: Three view models, one per widget, each at example/lib/showcase/feature/utilities/views/{widget_snake_case}_showcase/.
Each extends TBaseViewModel and exposes read-only ValueListenables.
MockContentService is consumed via constructor injection where needed.
non_goals: Mirroring TResponsiveBuilder's TData inside the view model (that data is read in the view from the builder callback).
acceptance_criteria: Three view model files exist at the expected paths.
Unit tests cover the non-trivial transitions (markdown filename selection, view builder identity flip).
tools_to_use: RepoPrompt MCP to read each widget's source.

testing_and_verification.unit_tests: Test markdown filename selection updates observable content identifier correctly; view builder identity flip produces a new identity value each call. No mocks.

quality_checklist.maintainability: These three view models are the thinnest in the repo — keep them that way.

workflow_instructions: Done: mark `done`, worklog, move to archive.
